== Notes for [[Item:Q83418|Q83418]] ==

He and his brother, [http://www.geni.com/people/Abu-Sufyaan-bin-al-Haarith/6000000014642974362/ Abu Sufyaan bin al-Haarith] were one among those 8 persons who did not flee in the '''Battle of Hunayn'''.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abu_Sufyan_ibn_al-Harith

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142A96851EFBC189822EF79916C3CA6
geni:6000000015278510058

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
